prompt: Restore local interface entries in show arp
note: Runtime now synchronizes non-aging interface ARP entries from VVRP Ethernet interfaces and IP addresses. show arp renders them as I - and counts them under Interface while dynamic learning cannot overwrite the authoritative local MAC.
decisions: Use ETHERNET effective MAC and IP-owned interface addresses as the authoritative source; do not depend on capturing VVRP outbound ARP frames.
